note: Crimean Front (Kerch peninsula, winter–spring 1942), placed on the detached kerch-front-1942 line by build-units — the same boundary-anchor mechanism as sectors/finnish.json. The 51st / 47th / 44th Armies (N->S: Sea of Azov to the Feodosia gulf) held the eastern Crimea behind the Parpach narrows until Operation Trappenjagd destroyed the front in May 1942; their rifle/mountain divisions ride the line at fixed fractions. 11. Armee (the Axis side) is placed on the main line / at Sevastopol, so it is not listed here.
